tamilStanzas:
மேக ராகமே
மேள தாளமே
தாரா ராதா

கால பாலகா
வாத மாதவா
ராமா மாரா

மாறுமா கைரேகை மாறுமா
மாயமா நீ நீ நீ மாயமா

வான கனவா
வாச நெசவா
மோகமோ
மோனமோ

பூ தந்த பூ
தீ தித்தி தீ
வா கற்க வா

போ சீ  சீ போ
தேயாதே
வேல நிலவே

மேக ராகமே
மேள தாளமே
ராமா மாரா

சேர அரசே
வேத கதவே
நேசனே  வாழவா

நீ நானா  நீ
மா மர்மமா
வைர இரவை
தைத்த விதத்தை
தேடாதே
மேக  முகமே

மேக ராகமே
மேள தாளமே
தாரா ராதா

கால பாலகா
வாத மாதவா
ராமா மாரா

மாறுமா கைரேகை மாறுமா
மாயமா நீ நீ நீ மாயமா

மேக ராகமே
மேள தாளமே
தாரா ராதா

seo.title: Mega Ragame Palindrome Song Lyrics Vinodhan
seo.description: Full Mega Ragame songs lyrics, Vinodhan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Karky, Music: D Imman, Singer(s): Haricharan, Shashaa Tirpathi.
seo.keywords: Karky, Vinodhan, D Imman, Haricharan, Shashaa Tirpathi, Mega Ragame full lyrics, Vinodhan songs lyrics, Mega Ragame lyrics snippets, Mega Ragame WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mega Ragame lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mega Ragame?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, celebrating love and connection through its catchy lyrics.

What is the plot context of the movie Vinodhan?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Mega Ragame?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi.

Who composed the music for Vinodhan?

The music for the movie was composed by D Imman, known for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was Mega Ragame released?

The song was published on January 9, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mega Ragame, the playful and romantic essence of love is captured through lively melodies and engaging lyrics. The song serves as a delightful expression of affection, perfectly fitting the light-hearted moments in the movie Vinodhan. With its catchy tune and vibrant energy, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. The collaboration between Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mega Ragame from the movie Vinodhan is a captivating duet that beautifully blends the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi. With its upbeat rhythm and playful lyrics by Karky, this song is sure to lift your spirits and make you dance. Experience the magic of D Imman's composition that brings a fresh vibe to Tamil music!
stanzaMeanings: Great melody, a song that is a palindrome.
Time passes, oh Lord, oh Rama, oh death.
Are you a miracle, are you a wonder, you, you, you are a wonder?
Sky, vision, love, is it a dream or a reality?
The flower gives, the fire burns, come, come, don't go, oh moon, don't leave.
Great melody, a song that is a palindrome.
Join together, oh king, let love flow.
You and I, you are the secret, the great mystery, searching for the great face.
Great melody, a song that is a palindrome.
Time passes, oh Lord, oh Rama, oh death.
Are you a miracle, are you a wonder, you, you, you are a wonder?
Great melody, a song that is a palindrome.
